steps: 10% SDS solution Dissolve 10 g SDS in 80 mL ddH 2 O Adjust volume to 100 mL undetermined Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:3423265

1M Tris Base, pH 8.0 Dissolve 12.114g Tris-Base in 80 mL ddH 2 O pH to 8.0 with 10 M HCl Adjust volume to 100mL undetermined Tris Hydroxymethylaminomethane Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID: 6503

0.5 M EDTA, pH 8.0 Add 18.61 g of disodium EDTA•2H 2 O to 80 mL of ddH 2 O Adjust the pH to 8.0 with NaOH (~20 NaOH pellets) Adjust volume to 100 mL undetermined EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
3 M NaCl Dissolve 17.532 g NaCl in 80 mL ddH 2 O Adjust volume to 100 mL undetermined Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234
Add 500µL IGEPAL-CA630 to 82.3 mL ddH 2 O Stir until dissolved undetermined Final concentration: 0.5% IGEPAL-CA630 Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #I3021 SIGMA-ALDRICH
Add 0.5g Sodium deoxycholate Stir until dissolved Final concentration: 0.5% Sodium Deoxycholate Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:23668196
Add 10 mL of 10% SDS stock solution Stir until dissolved undetermined Final concentration: 1% 1% SDS = 34.67 mM Sodium Dodecyl Sulfate Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:3423265
Add 5 mL of 3M NaCl stock solution undetermined Final concentration: 150 mM Sodium Chloride Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:5234
Add 200 µL of 0.5 M EDTA (pH 8.0) stock solution undetermined Final concentration: 1 mM EDTA Disodium Salt Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID:8759
Add 1 mL Tris-Base (pH 8.0) Stir until dissolved undetermined Final concentration: 10 mM Tris Hydroxymethylaminomethane Contributed by users Catalog #PubChem CID: 6503
Add 1mL of RNase A (10 mg/mL) stock solution undetermined Final concentration: 100 µg/mL RNase A (10 mg/mL) Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #EN0531

Add PVPP Add 2g Polyvinylpolypyrrolidone, stir until dissolved. undetermined Final concentration 2% PVPP precipitates phenols, tannins, alkaloids which may inhibit enzymes or damage DNA Polyvinylpolypyrrolidone Contributed by users Catalog #CID 6917
